summary: Admin Dashboard feature fully tested. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed: (1) Admin user sees Admin tab in sidebar, (2) Non-admin user does NOT see Admin tab, (3) All 4 admin sub-tabs work (Analytics, Users, Activity, System), (4) User management actions (search, toggle admin/disable, reset password, delete) all functional with proper modals.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns is_admin=True flag - PASS
Backend: Non-admin login returns is_admin=False - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns user list with stats (admin auth) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns 401 for unauthenticated - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics returns platform stats (admin auth) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/activity returns activity log (admin auth) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/activity?action=login filters correctly - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/activity returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/users/{id} toggles is_disabled flag - PASS
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/users/{id} returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password works - PASS
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password validates password length - PASS
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/system/leaderboard returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/system/snapshots returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: Admin system controls endpoint accessible - PASS
Frontend: Admin user (shubhrangshub@gmail.com) sees Admin tab in sidebar - PASS
Frontend: Non-admin user (test@automl.com) does NOT see Admin tab - PASS
Frontend: Admin Analytics tab shows stats (47 users, 116 sessions, 62 analyses, 12 models) - PASS
Frontend: Admin Users tab lists 47 users with search functionality - PASS
Frontend: Admin Users search filter works correctly - PASS
Frontend: Admin Users toggle admin/disable buttons present - PASS
Frontend: Admin Users reset password modal opens correctly - PASS
Frontend: Admin Users delete confirmation modal opens correctly - PASS
Frontend: Admin Activity tab shows 24 activity entries - PASS
Frontend: Admin Activity filter dropdown present - PASS
Frontend: Admin System tab shows Danger Zone with Clear buttons - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Backend admin endpoints properly protected with require_admin() decorator
Activity logging implemented for login, signup, train, save_analysis, and admin actions
Admin seed correctly sets is_admin=True for shubhrangshub@gmail.com on startup
Frontend correctly conditionally renders Admin tab based on authUser?.is_admin
All admin data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 47 test users from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: nav-admin (sidebar), admin-view, admin-tab-analytics, admin-tab-users, admin-tab-activity, admin-tab-system, admin-user-search, admin-user-row-{n}, admin-toggle-admin-{n}, admin-toggle-disable-{n}, admin-reset-pw-{n}, admin-delete-user-{n}, admin-activity-{n}, admin-clear-leaderboard, admin-clear-snapshots. Admin user is shubhrangshub@gmail.com (seeded with is_admin=true). Backend has 6 admin endpoints all prefixed /api/admin/. Activity logging tracks login, signup, train, save_analysis, and admin actions.
